title: Genie One enhancements
body:
* **Share chats with account users**: You can now share Genie One chats with all users in your account as read-only. See [Share a chat](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#share-chat).
* **New external source connections (Beta)**: Chat in Genie One now supports connecting to Gmail and additional Microsoft 365 apps (Teams, Outlook, and Calendar). See [Connect to external tools and sources](/aws/en/genie-one/external-sources).
* **Scheduled task frequency limit**: Scheduled tasks can no longer be created with a frequency greater than daily. Hourly and per-minute frequencies are no longer supported. Contact your Databricks account team if you require more frequent scheduling.
* **Scheduled task email prefix**: Scheduled task notification emails now use the prefix "Genie Task:" instead of "Task update:".

ref_links.text: Connect to external tools and sources
